place: Hoboken city, New Jersey, New Jersey

facts.text: Hoboken is nicknamed the Mile Square City, a playful reference to its roughly one‑square‑mile footprint.
Frank Sinatra Park, a waterfront green space in Hoboken, honors the legendary singer who once lived nearby.
The Hoboken Historical Museum, housed in a former railroad depot, showcases the city’s rich maritime and industrial past.
In 2013, a film‑production consortium moved its operations to the Hoboken Historical Museum, turning the space into a creative hub.
Hoboken’s official city website, hobokennj.gov, offers residents and visitors a portal to local news, events, and municipal services.
